project_type: Python desktop app (PySide6 GUI + CLI) for Salesforce translation workflow
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml; PyInstaller for executable builds (build_exe.py)
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures, pytest-qt for GUI tests
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' to install all deps. 2. pytest -q to run all tests. 3. Verify new tests pass.
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' installs core + GUI + dev dependencies
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11 default. No Windows for actual installer testing.
contribution_requirements: Standard Python project - ruff for linting, pytest for tests, pyproject.toml for deps
key_patterns: Modules in src/stx/. Tests in tests/test_*.py. GUI pages in src/stx/gui/pages/. Entry points: stx.cli:app (CLI), stx.gui.app:main (GUI). Existing build_exe.py uses PyInstaller. CI at .github/workflows/ci.yml.
directory_structure: src/stx/ - main package; src/stx/gui/ - GUI layer; src/stx/gui/pages/ - phase pages; src/stx/stf/ - STF parser/writer; src/stx/translate/ - translation backends; tests/ - test suite; .github/workflows/ - CI
